knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-034-Regulatory-Change Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: RC-020 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: RC-001 Approved regulatory source | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Approved regulatory source | Critical | CCO. RC-002 Source monitoring | Detective | Flag/alert on detected condition | Critical | CCO. RC-003 Change extraction | Governance | Require documented compliance: Change extraction | Critical | CCO. RC-004 Applicability handoff | Governance | Require documented compliance: Applicability handoff | Critical | CCO. RC-005 Impact assessment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Impact assessment | Critical | CCO. RC-006 Owner assignment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Owner assignment | Critical | CCO. RC-007 Deadline tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Deadline tracking | Critical | CCO. RC-008 Policy mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Policy mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-009 Control mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Control mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-010 Process mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Process mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-011 System mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: System mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-012 Training mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Training mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-013 Filing mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Filing mapping | Critical | CCO. RC-014 Implementation plan | Governance | Require documented compliance: Implementation plan | Critical | CCO. RC-015 Exception approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Exception approval | Critical | CCO. RC-016 Closure evidence | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Closure evidence | High | CCO. RC-017 Legal review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Legal review | High | CCO. RC-018 Compliance approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Compliance approval | High | CCO. RC-019 AI interpretation prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI interpretation prohibition | High | AI Governance. RC-020 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. RC-021 Versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Versioning | High | CCO. RC-022 Supersession | Governance | Require documented compliance: Supersession | High | CCO. RC-023 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | CCO. RC-024 Board escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | High | CCO. RC-025 Post-implementation review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Post-implementation review | High | CCO.
